raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Index builder incorrectly skips all files due to hardcoded SKIP_DIRS including 'archive', where it itself is located. When moved to archive, it began skipping its own traversal paths.", "recommended_fix": "Move code_index.py back to packages/swarm/ and update project_root logic. Remove 'archive' from SKIP_DIRS to allow indexing of archived tools if needed."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "The index is completely broken — agents are operating blind, violating Constitution's evidence-based mandate.", "next_files_to_read": ["packages/swarm/code_index.py", "memory/swarm/code-index.json"]}

findings.issue: Index builder incorrectly skips all files due to hardcoded SKIP_DIRS including 'archive', where it itself is located. When moved to archive, it began skipping its own traversal paths.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py back to packages/swarm/ and update project_root logic. Remove 'archive' from SKIP_DIRS to allow indexing of archived tools if needed.

whistleblower_flag: The index is completely broken — agents are operating blind, violating Constitution's evidence-based mandate.
